# Vendored MiniMax PPTX Skills

This directory is a pinned vendor snapshot from `https://github.com/MiniMax-AI/skills.git`.

- Commit: `34c6cf05d7a2b68076bafa00e6f360bc9506bba6`
- Paths:
  - `plugins/pptx-plugin`
  - `skills/pptx-generator`

Refresh with:

```bash
bash scripts/vendor/sync_minimax_skills.sh
```
